observations: The hero headline 'Specification for the AI Age' and the accent-colored subheading 'the AI Age' render clearly with strong visual hierarchy on the dark background.
The meta banner is present and visible at the top of every viewport, fulfilling the self-referential demo requirement from SEED.md.

During the scroll animation sequence captured in the screenshots, the sticky navbar overlaps the hero text mid-transition, creating a brief but noticeable content collision that a human should verify in a live browser.

The 'The Problem' section heading and its supporting cards ('Spec drift', 'AI limitations', 'Missing context') arrive legibly at the bottom of the scroll sequence, though the card icons appear quite small at the captured viewport width.
The CTA pair ('Get started on GitHub' / 'Explore the spec') is consistently present and well-spaced across all captured states.
